INFO PAGE
Family Planning Program
Family planning empowers people to choose if and when they have children.
The family planning program at DPH supports clinics in the SF Health Network.
We are not a direct service provider. Our office provides support and technical help to clinic sites. Those services include:
Support with Family Pact and Title X programs
Reproductive health trainings for staff and medical providers
Family planning protocols and screening tools
Culturally and linguistically appropriate client education materials
Outreach and community education
For more information, email FamilyPlanningProgram@sfdph.org.
Family planning medical services are available from the SF Health Network.
Services are free or low-cost. They are also completely confidential. Family planning services include:
Emergency Contraception
Pregnancy Tests, Counseling and Referral
Birth Control Counseling & Prescriptions
STI Testing and Treatment
HIV Counseling and Testing
Reproductive Health Exams
Infertility Assessment & Referral
Preconception Health Screening and Education
Reproductive Life Planning
Sexual Health Education and Counseling
